subject: Ready to ace your interview? We're here to help.
body:
Read our pro-tips, directly from hiring managers.




Can't see this email? View in Your Browser 
<https://links.wellfound.com/s/vb/2E3FMojotFYKmz7hP7u9hp2PY3WPveuyS31MFPvVL0kqEgkk9s8Nd-7FnCXRp5AQadHaiJQsOdamklhxSuwqMntyiZrVzx7sES_JvdNJDNO03esG_N7lNpvyH7VTpX2hlJhjyNZpJeKELKpeU-Im/_KZYWHZYXQTSBTgFs08BUauZKl9Je-8i/19>




 <https://wellfound.com> 








 
<https://angel.co/blog/how-to-make-your-angellist-talent-profile-stand-out-to-recruiters-2022>



#1: Look over their entire company profile 

 We had to get this one out of the way. It may seem obvious, but researching 
the company beforehand will go a long way.



Pro Tip: We consolidated all the important information in our company profiles 
to make it easy for you.

 Make sure to toggle through all the profile tabs to learn about the founders, 
investors, funding stage, history and culture.



#2: Read up on noteworthy news 

We provide informative, published mentions of each startup in the company 
profile. Knowing the history and current stage of the company will not only 
impress your interviewer, it will also make you feel a lot more confident when 
discussing and asking questions later on.



#3: Put faces to names 

Check out the team page, where you can take a look at who exactly you'd be 
working with. You can cross-check this with your interviewers as you prepare to 
personalize your conversations.



#4: Lean into the highlighted skills

We know you're a multi-faceted individual with a wide variety of skills, 
however in this case, it's best to find the skills within the job description 
that you confidently embody, then go full-in with examples and stories from 
your experience that directly showcase these skills.



Pro Tip: Relevancy is key. Try to find the most applicable stories to the job 
you're interviewing for.

Pro Tip: Use numbers whenever you can. It not only shows you took the time to 
prepare, it also shows how you quantifiably drive impact.

Pro Tip: Make sure to touch on the ~soft skills~ as well! These are just as 
important as any numbers — remember, at the end of the day we're all human, and 
your interviewer wants to see that as well.



#6: Show your excitement, but not all your cards

If this company embodies the same values as you, has an amazing mission, or is 
simply a product you're excited to work on, make sure to let them know! There's 
nothing better than genuine passion for an opportunity.



At the same time, you want to keep a bit of mystery around where you're at 
with other job prospects, as well as disclosing any current compensation 
upfront.



Pro-Tip: Wait until the final rounds to discuss either of these in detail. Use 
oursalary calculator  <https://wellfound.com/hiring-data>to make sure you know 
your worth prior to any discussions.



#7: Be curious, ask questions

Never leave a job interview without asking the interviewer at least one 
question. Our jobs are a substantial part of our lives, we should all be asking
manyquestions to make sure it's a good fit. Not to mention, it shows you're 
curious, and everyone loves a bit of curiosity!





With these tips, your dream job is closer than ever. Here's to finding whats 
next.





Read more interview tips from the pros  
<https://wellfound.com/blog/tell-me-about-yourself-interview-question>






Ever wonder if you're better suited for a corporate environment vs. early to 
mid-stage startup?

Read our blog post <https://wellfound.com/blog/startup-vs-corporate> to get a 
better idea of what's best for you.

Welcome to Wipro - Thank You for Creating Your Application Form!
body:
Dear Mrunmayee,

You are just a few steps away from an exciting world of opportunities.

We appreciate your interest in Wipro and your application for the position of JUNIOR ASSOCIATE SOFTWARE ENGINEER - 148662. Since we are always particular about placing the right people in the right roles, we review all applications meticulously.

We are eager to have capable and fun-loving people onboard. Does that ring a bell? We hope so and wish that your profile matches the opportunity you are seeking.

If you are selected, we want to ensure that your hiring experience is smooth and swift. So, we suggest that you keep your profile updated on the Wipro Career Portal, Wipro’s online engagement portal that provides end-to-end hiring and onboarding assistance.

Don’t get disheartened if you don’t fit the bill for the current opening. Wipro always keeps its doors open for all candidates. You can log into the Wipro Career Portal again to search for other relevant openings. What’s more, you can use this platform to track and follow up with our recruiters.

You are also welcome to subscribe to updates on the happenings at Wipro Limited.

Reinvent Your World with Wipro. Access the Wipro Career Portal here.

Best regards,
Recruitment Team
Wipro

We are an Equal Opportunity/Affirmative Action Employer. All qualified applicants receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability status, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

Wipro does not charge any fee at any stage of the recruiting process and has not authorized agencies/partners to collect any fee for recruitment. If you encounter any suspicious emails, advertisements, or persons who offer jobs at Wipro, please let us know by contacting us at heldesk.recruitment@wipro.com.

This is an autogenerated email from Wipro. All rights reserved.

subject: Make the most of your job search.
body:
Our 7 best tips to find your dream job.




Can't see this email? View in Your Browser 
<https://links.wellfound.com/s/vb/5Q4qu1KW36L7u0GLYtksJEnwKLjQawnns3Ogk9WPjlf57TEM6aQumeL7s_dQ_xme4ct1mfTO3Sfvqy244zv_saqdvU0pXndhxZBMLIuk6rGtM8QlIF3IGfjgqmoXqOfQRZB-lTC3I07lpnCRDKAj/OiF_Q_sQbUZ01z_ErCZtDOiSA2X9IjrK/19>




 <https://wellfound.com> 


 
<https://wellfound.com/blog/how-to-make-your-angellist-talent-profile-stand-out-to-recruiters-2022>



TIP #1: Set remote or work style preference

 Start your search by defining your preference with our remote jobs filter 
<https://help.wellfound.com/article/762-remote-job-search-filters>. This will 
help you filter by your preference of fully remote, hybrid, or in-office.



TIP #2: Filter by desired salary & equity

Job postings on Wellfound require salary transparency upfront. You can update 
your compensation salary, equity, and currency filters to only be shown jobs 
that match your desired salary or higher.



TIP #3: Filter by job type 

The job types filter is an easy way to find role types you are looking for. 
Filter by contract roles, internship positions, or even co-founder positions at 
early stage startups.



TIP #4: Search by keywords

Use the keywords filter to personalize & narrow your search. For example, if 
you’re looking for Marketing roles in web3, add “web3” to your keywords filter.



TIP #5: Filter by company size and investment stage

 Use the company size filter and investment stage filter to narrow your search 
even further depending on what you're looking for. Read more aboutstartup vs. 
corporate on the blog. <https://wellfound.com/blog/startup-vs-corporate>



TIP #6: Use the immigration toggle bar

If you’re looking to work in the U.S. and are currently international, the 
Immigration filter is a great way to filter to companies that have the 
availability to sponsor work visas.



TIP #7: Sort your jobs & create a job alert

Use the saved search section to create a new set of criteria of jobs you’re 
interested in applying for. Ourjob alerts section will also enable 
notifications when a new role is listed that matches your saved searches.

Start your search  <https://wellfound.com/jobs>






Want to know more about how to make the most out of your job search on 
Wellfound? Check out our blog post. 
<https://wellfound.com/blog/7-best-job-search-features-on-angellist-talent-you-might-not-know-about>

TIP #1: Elaborate on your experience 

 Make sure your experience is up-to-date and accurately reflects your work 
history, skills, and current job title. Don't be afraid to show off - the more 
detail the better.



TIP #2: PDF Resume, please!

 Upload a PDF version of your resume (recruiters tell us this is the #1 thing 
they look for).



TIP #3: Indicate your ideal work-style 

 Fill out the culture tab and bio sections to highlight your work style 
preference and add a bit of personality beyond your resume.



TIP #4: Be picky — set your preferences

 Set comprehensive preferences — including salary range, company size, and 
industry — to receive the most relevant pitches.



TIP #5: Let recruiters know you're ready

 Update your job search status to ready to interview so recruiters know you 
are likely to respond and can reach out with aligned opportunities.

body:
You’re invited to
CommunityMeetups
Thursday, January 1 12:00 AM - Dec 31, 11:30 PM GMT+5:30
Location: In Person

Hi there, We’re excited to share a massive milestone with you 🎉 CommunityMeetups has now grown to 267k+ members across India 🇮🇳 on our Luma event calendar! What started as an initiative has now become one of India’s fastest-growing community ecosystems powered by builders, learners, creators, and collaborators like you. But this is just the beginning. As we enter our next phase of growth, we’re not just scaling numbers, we’re building a Core Squad that will shape the future of CommunityMeetups. 🌟 Why This Matters This isn’t just another community. This is a movement to bridge the gap between students & professionals through: • Meetups & networking events • Hands-on workshops & webinars • Hackathons & competitions • Conferences & industry sessions 🚀 We’re Looking For People who don’t just want to “join” but want to build, lead, and take ownership. We’re opening roles across: Engineering | Design (UI/UX, Graphics, Branding) | Growth | Marketing | Content | PR | Sponsorships | Community Collaborations | Operations | Event Management | Outreach | Onboarding & more (If your domain isn’t listed, we still want to hear from you.) 💡 What You Get • Real ownership & leadership experience • Opportunity to become a founding team member • Work closely on a fast-growing community across India • Build your network with top builders & professionals 📩 Ready to Build With Us? 👉 Apply here: https://forms.gle/VAEypht3m1wT2qJy6 📧 Or reach out at: communitymeetups2k@gmail.com 🤝 Stay Connected • WhatsApp Community: https://chat.whatsapp.com/LraWc7bsawYCMVWwuWClIP • All links & updates: https://linktr.ee/communitymeetups One thing to be clear: This is not my community. This is OUR community. ❌ Not for those waiting for instructions ✅ For those ready to take ownership & build something impactful Let’s shape the future of communities together. Best, Team CommunityMeetups

body:
Hi Mrunmayee,
Hope you are doing well. Recently we sent you an email regarding Java Spring Boot & Microservice Realtime project development. Looks like you haven't registered for it yet. Rather than waiting in job market for getting opportunity, if you can take up this project development, work as per IT ways, and parallel do jobhunting, then it would be more valuable for your further job opportunities.  
I would suggest you to join us. You would gain knowledge equivalent to 1-2 years experience working professional.  And your knowledge will grow by 80%. You can confidently present this project & knowledge in interview, and it would get you job quickly.
If you feel, this mail is wrongly sent to you, and you wish to stop receiving future emails from us, then kindly request you to click: Unsubscribe Here
✅ Please note, from 6Apr 2026, 10AM, we are starting 2 months Java Spring Boot & Microservice Project development. We will build Payment Integration Project from scratch. You would get hands-on knowledge on end-to-end IT Project Development, AI pair programming & modern development practices. 

Please registration below for reserving your slot:
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeyai7cEAMJYu1zD1zpxmTJOitPTa0B77ZDQUfm8HgU4qsgEA/viewform?usp=pp_url&entry.1125344132=Email

    Join us LIVE on 6Apr 2026, 10AM.
    End-to-end project development, performing tasks in project domain, design, LIVE coding, tools, end-to-end exposure of working in IT.  AI pair programming & modern development practices.
    You can add this project in resume. 
    You would be issued Trainee Offer Letter, Completion Letter & your designation: Java Developer Trainee. 
    Join us from 6Apr 2026, we will connect daily Mon-Fri, 10 AM (2-3hrs LIVE). And during the day, you will be expected to work on project tasks.
    You will get recording access, so you can revisit the topics for deeper understanding.
    Prerequisites: You are expected to have good knowledge in CoreJava, Jdbc, basics of web like Tomcat, Servlets

✅ If you can join us from 6Apr 2026, 10AM, kindly register below. We will share meeting joining link, one week before the connect.

3 Steps to Register:

    Please register below NOW: 

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeyai7cEAMJYu1zD1zpxmTJOitPTa0B77ZDQUfm8HgU4qsgEA/viewform?usp=pp_url&entry.1125344132=Email

    Join your whatsapp group for further updates:

https://chat.whatsapp.com/Kn5DHmyYalV4M8LFoL3bWX

    Reply back to this email as DONE 

✅ We will cover below Technology Stack in this 2months Trainee Program:

    Programming Languages: Java
    Frameworks: Spring Boot
    Microservices Architecture, Circuit Breaker, Eureka Service Registry
    AI-Augmented Development: GitHub Copilot, Claude, ChatGPT, AI-assisted coding, automated test generation, API Documentation 
    RESTful APIs: JSON, CURL, Postman, Swagger
    Databases: MySQL (AWS RDS)
    Version Control Systems: Git, BitBucket/GitHub, SourceTree
    Build Tools: Maven
    Application Server: Embedded Tomcat
    Testing Frameworks: Unit Testing(Junit), Mocking, Code Coverage
    Cloud Platforms: AWS (Amazon Web Services) - EC2, RDS, SecretManager
    IDEs: Eclipse, DBEaver
    Messaging Technologies: ActiveMQ
    Cache Technologies: Redis
    Agile Methodologies: Scrum, Agile Development
    Project management tool: Jira
    Logging, Debugging & Troubleshooting: Eclipse, Log4J, Spring Cloud Sleuth 
    Security and Authentication: Spring Security, HMACSha256, RSA Private and public encryption
    Performance Tuning | Design Patterns | Code Review | Data Structures | Algorithms
    Other tools: Jackson, Lombok, Sonar Qube, Mobaxterm

See you soon!

✅ Please register now, for confirming your slot. We start 6Apr 2026, 10 AM:
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeyai7cEAMJYu1zD1zpxmTJOitPTa0B77ZDQUfm8HgU4qsgEA/viewform?usp=pp_url&entry.1125344132=Email
See you.

Thanks & Regards,

body:
Hello there,

I hope you’re doing well. My name is Alejandro Quinones, and I work in
Talent Acquisition at JPMorgan Chase, helping students and early-career
professionals connect with opportunities that align with their strengths. I
noticed your interest in 2026 internships and graduate programs, and I
wanted to reach out to you directly.

After reviewing your background, I believe you may be a strong fit for
several opportunities we’re actively hiring for. Before moving you forward,
I’d like to learn a bit more to ensure we match you with the right role.

Could you share the following:

Updated Résumé/CV
Preferred Role or Functional Area (Finance, Accounting, Consulting,
Business Analysis, Strategy, or Operations)
Preferred Working Arrangement (Remote, Hybrid, or On-site)
Location Preference (or flexibility)
Your Current Status (student, job seeker, employed, etc.)
Relevant Skills & Certifications
Availability to Start
Expected Compensation Range (optional)

Once I have these details, I will review your profile and, if aligned,
forward it to the appropriate hiring managers. We move quickly, and strong
candidates often proceed within the same week.

Looking forward to your response.

*-Alejandro Quinones-*
Talent Acquisition Specialist | JPMorgan Chase & Co | Global Career

*Make More of What's Yours*

🌐Explore Career at JPMorgan Chase <https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers>
